title: Data Ownership, Integrity, Migrations, and Lifecycle Governance · Evidence Recall
summary: A delayed review reconstructs data ownership, integrity, migrations, and lifecycle governance from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for governed data model and migration rehearsal after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign authoritative source, steward, identity, update rights, derived copies, synchronization, and dispute resolution for each entity.
Protect uniqueness, relationships, state invariants, transaction boundaries, and concurrency behavior at complementary layers.
Plan expand-migrate-contract changes with old/new reader and writer compatibility, backfill, verification, pause, and rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Data Owner Source · changed case · Review Data Owner Source
steps.instruction:
review case — Three stores claim authority for the same entity while copied data, conflicting meanings, irreversible migration, and deletion gaps accumulate. The review variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Assign authoritative source, steward, identity, update rights, derived copies, synchronization, and dispute resolution for each entity.

Which action demonstrates Data Owner Source without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Data Owner Source · changed case · Review Data Owner Source.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for assign authoritative source, steward, identity, update rights, derived copies, synchronization, and dispute resolution for each entity. For Data Owner Source · changed case · Review Data Owner Source, keep Data Owner Source connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Three stores claim authority for the same entity while copied data, conflicting meanings, irreversible migration, and deletion gaps accumulate. The review variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Assign authoritative source, steward, identity, update rights, derived copies, synchronization, and dispute resolution for each entity.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Data Owner Source condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: NIST Secure Software Development Framework — Controls prepared organizations, protected software, well-secured production, vulnerability response, provenance, verification, and release evidence.

For Data Owner Source · changed case · Review Data Owner Source, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: The database containing a value owns its meaning.

stimulus.title: Data Reconciliation case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Three stores claim authority for the same entity while copied data, conflicting meanings, irreversible migration, and deletion gaps accumulate. The review variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Reconcile counts, checksums, invariants, samples, rejects, and actor-visible outcomes before and after migration or repair.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Matching total row counts proves a migration preserved meaning.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reconcile counts, checksums, invariants, samples, rejects, and actor-visible outcomes before and after migration or repair. Artifact under review: governed data model and migration rehearsal.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Data Reconciliation, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Data Reconciliation
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Data Reconciliation: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Three stores claim authority for the same entity while copied data, conflicting meanings, irreversible migration, and deletion gaps accumulate. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Reconcile counts, checksums, invariants, samples, rejects, and actor-visible outcomes before and after migration or repair.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Data Reconciliation.

For Record what required effort · Review Data Reconciliation, keep Data Reconciliation connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Reconcile counts, checksums, invariants, samples, rejects, and actor-visible outcomes before and after migration or repair.
